title: ClawHub Studio v0.2.0 — author, test & publish agent skills from one local app
content:
I built ClawHub Studio: a local-first studio to author, test, version and publish agent skills — with a real backend, signed auth, a test-runner UI, and one-click ClawHub publishing.

Zero dependencies (stdlib http.server + sqlite3). 34 tests, Python 3.8/3.11 CI, polished SPA. Open source.

Why: building skills by hand is error-prone and unverified. This gives you a real toolchain instead of loose scripts.

Run it:
  git clone https://github.com/itsPremkumar/clawhub-studio
  cd clawhub-studio && python -m studio serve --open

Live on ClawHub: https://www.clawhub.ai/skills/skills/skill-studio
Repo: https://github.com/itsPremkumar/clawhub-studio

Free. If it saves you time, a coffee helps: https://github.com/sponsors/itsPremkumar
